case_title: DANIEL L. SCHER VS. JAMES WHITE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHER, DANIEL L. TRUSTEE FOR THE DANIEL L. SCHER REVOCABLE TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 999 BUSH STREET #303 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $4,600.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,600.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-10-2004, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
